commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 10 July

NYSE dominates liquidity metrics across all three dimensions, with minimal price impact (ILLIQ=0.0013) and tightest spreads (Roll 1.05%, AR 0.43%). Nasdaq 100 follows closely as the second-most liquid venue. London Stock Exchange significantly lags peer exchanges, exhibiting substantially higher price impact (ILLIQ=0.1270) and widest AR spreads (0.88%), suggesting notably thinner order books. European continental exchanges (Euronext, Xetra, SIX) occupy intermediate positions with comparable spread metrics but divergent price impact measures.
